creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 245477
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.47.1

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.47.1.

The changes from v2.43.0 until this version include multiple bugfixes and enhancements. A full changelog is available at: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

-David
